Set-StrictMode -Version Latest
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'

<#
.SYNOPSIS
    Directory Tree Sync — compares two directory trees by SHA-256 content hash,
    identifies differences, and generates/executes a sync plan.

.DESCRIPTION
    Provides functions to:
    - Hash all files in a directory tree (Get-FileHashMap)
    - Compare two directory trees (Compare-DirectoryTrees)
    - Generate a sync plan (New-SyncPlan)
    - Execute a sync plan in dry-run or execute mode (Invoke-SyncPlan)
#>

function Get-FileHashMap {
    <#
    .SYNOPSIS
        Builds a hashtable mapping relative file paths to their SHA-256 hashes.
    #>
    [CmdletBinding()]
    [OutputType([hashtable])]
    param(
        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
        [string]$Path
    )

    if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $Path -PathType Container)) {
        throw "Directory not found: $Path"
    }

    [hashtable]$hashMap = @{}
    [string]$resolvedRoot = (Resolve-Path -LiteralPath $Path).Path

    # Get all files recursively
    [System.IO.FileInfo[]]$files = @(Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $resolvedRoot -File -Recurse)

    foreach ($file in $files) {
        # Compute relative path and normalize to forward slashes
        [string]$relativePath = $file.FullName.Substring($resolvedRoot.Length).TrimStart([System.IO.Path]::DirectorySeparatorChar, '/')
        [string]$normalizedPath = $relativePath.Replace([System.IO.Path]::DirectorySeparatorChar, '/')

        # Compute SHA-256 hash
        [string]$hash = (Get-FileHash -LiteralPath $file.FullName -Algorithm SHA256).Hash
        $hashMap[$normalizedPath] = $hash
    }

    return $hashMap
}

It 'Should use relative paths as keys including subdirectories' {
        $subDir = Join-Path $script:testRoot 'sub'
        New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $subDir -Force | Out-Null
        $filePath = Join-Path $subDir 'nested.txt'
        Set-Content -Path $filePath -Value 'nested content' -NoNewline

        $result = Get-FileHashMap -Path $script:testRoot
        $result.Count | Should -Be 1
        # Use forward-slash normalized path
        $key = 'sub/nested.txt'
        $result.ContainsKey($key) | Should -BeTrue
    }
}

Describe 'Compare-DirectoryTrees' {
    BeforeEach {
        $script:sourceRoot = Join-Path ([System.IO.Path]::GetTempPath()) "DirSyncSrc_$([System.Guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N'))"
        $script:targetRoot = Join-Path ([System.IO.Path]::GetTempPath()) "DirSyncTgt_$([System.Guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N'))"
        New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $script:sourceRoot -Force | Out-Null
        New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $script:targetRoot -Force | Out-Null
    }

    AfterEach {
        if (Test-Path $script:sourceRoot) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $script:sourceRoot }
        if (Test-Path $script:targetRoot) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $script:targetRoot }
    }

    It 'Should detect files only in source' {
        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:sourceRoot 'only-src.txt') -Value 'src' -NoNewline

        $result = Compare-DirectoryTrees -SourcePath $script:sourceRoot -TargetPath $script:targetRoot
        $result.SourceOnly.Count | Should -Be 1
        $result.SourceOnly[0] | Should -Be 'only-src.txt'
        $result.TargetOnly.Count | Should -Be 0
        $result.Modified.Count | Should -Be 0
        $result.Identical.Count | Should -Be 0
    }

    It 'Should detect files only in target' {
        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:targetRoot 'only-tgt.txt') -Value 'tgt' -NoNewline

        $result = Compare-DirectoryTrees -SourcePath $script:sourceRoot -TargetPath $script:targetRoot
        $result.SourceOnly.Count | Should -Be 0
        $result.TargetOnly.Count | Should -Be 1
        $result.TargetOnly[0] | Should -Be 'only-tgt.txt'
    }

    It 'Should detect modified files (same name, different content)' {
        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:sourceRoot 'shared.txt') -Value 'version A' -NoNewline
        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:targetRoot 'shared.txt') -Value 'version B' -NoNewline

        $result = Compare-DirectoryTrees -SourcePath $script:sourceRoot -TargetPath $script:targetRoot
        $result.Modified.Count | Should -Be 1
        $result.Modified[0] | Should -Be 'shared.txt'
        $result.Identical.Count | Should -Be 0
    }

    It 'Should detect identical files' {
        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:sourceRoot 'same.txt') -Value 'identical' -NoNewline
        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:targetRoot 'same.txt') -Value 'identical' -NoNewline

        $result = Compare-DirectoryTrees -SourcePath $script:sourceRoot -TargetPath $script:targetRoot
        $result.Identical.Count | Should -Be 1
        $result.Identical[0] | Should -Be 'same.txt'
        $result.Modified.Count | Should -Be 0
    }

    It 'Should handle a mixed scenario with nested directories' {
        # Source: a.txt, sub/b.txt, sub/c.txt
        # Target: a.txt (different content), sub/b.txt (same), sub/d.txt
        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:sourceRoot 'a.txt') -Value 'hello' -NoNewline
        New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path (Join-Path $script:sourceRoot 'sub') -Force | Out-Null
        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:sourceRoot 'sub/b.txt') -Value 'same' -NoNewline
        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:sourceRoot 'sub/c.txt') -Value 'only in source' -NoNewline

        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:targetRoot 'a.txt') -Value 'world' -NoNewline
        New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path (Join-Path $script:targetRoot 'sub') -Force | Out-Null
        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:targetRoot 'sub/b.txt') -Value 'same' -NoNewline
        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:targetRoot 'sub/d.txt') -Value 'only in target' -NoNewline

        $result = Compare-DirectoryTrees -SourcePath $script:sourceRoot -TargetPath $script:targetRoot
        $result.SourceOnly | Should -Contain 'sub/c.txt'
        $result.TargetOnly | Should -Contain 'sub/d.txt'
        $result.Modified | Should -Contain 'a.txt'
        $result.Identical | Should -Contain 'sub/b.txt'
    }
}

        $script:sourceRoot = Join-Path ([System.IO.Path]::GetTempPath()) "DirSyncSrc_$([System.Guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N'))"
        $script:targetRoot = Join-Path ([System.IO.Path]::GetTempPath()) "DirSyncTgt_$([System.Guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N'))"
        New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $script:sourceRoot -Force | Out-Null
        New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $script:targetRoot -Force | Out-Null
    }

    AfterEach {
        if (Test-Path $script:sourceRoot) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $script:sourceRoot }
        if (Test-Path $script:targetRoot) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $script:targetRoot }
    }

    It 'Should detect files only in source' {
        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:sourceRoot 'only-src.txt') -Value 'src' -NoNewline

        $result = Compare-DirectoryTrees -SourcePath $script:sourceRoot -TargetPath $script:targetRoot
        $result.SourceOnly.Count | Should -Be 1
        $result.SourceOnly[0] | Should -Be 'only-src.txt'
        $result.TargetOnly.Count | Should -Be 0
        $result.Modified.Count | Should -Be 0
        $result.Identical.Count | Should -Be 0
    }

    It 'Should detect files only in target' {
        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:targetRoot 'only-tgt.txt') -Value 'tgt' -NoNewline

        $result = Compare-DirectoryTrees -SourcePath $script:sourceRoot -TargetPath $script:targetRoot
        $result.SourceOnly.Count | Should -Be 0
        $result.TargetOnly.Count | Should -Be 1
        $result.TargetOnly[0] | Should -Be 'only-tgt.txt'
    }

    It 'Should detect modified files (same name, different content)' {
        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:sourceRoot 'shared.txt') -Value 'version A' -NoNewline
        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:targetRoot 'shared.txt') -Value 'version B' -NoNewline

        $result = Compare-DirectoryTrees -SourcePath $script:sourceRoot -TargetPath $script:targetRoot
        $result.Modified.Count | Should -Be 1
        $result.Modified[0] | Should -Be 'shared.txt'
        $result.Identical.Count | Should -Be 0
    }

    It 'Should detect identical files' {
        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:sourceRoot 'same.txt') -Value 'identical' -NoNewline
        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:targetRoot 'same.txt') -Value 'identical' -NoNewline

        $result = Compare-DirectoryTrees -SourcePath $script:sourceRoot -TargetPath $script:targetRoot
        $result.Identical.Count | Should -Be 1
        $result.Identical[0] | Should -Be 'same.txt'
        $result.Modified.Count | Should -Be 0
    }

    It 'Should handle a mixed scenario with nested directories' {

        # Target: a.txt (different content), sub/b.txt (same), sub/d.txt
        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:sourceRoot 'a.txt') -Value 'hello' -NoNewline
        New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path (Join-Path $script:sourceRoot 'sub') -Force | Out-Null

        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:sourceRoot 'sub/c.txt') -Value 'only in source' -NoNewline

        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:targetRoot 'a.txt') -Value 'world' -NoNewline
        New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path (Join-Path $script:targetRoot 'sub') -Force | Out-Null
        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:targetRoot 'sub/b.txt') -Value 'same' -NoNewline
        Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $script:targetRoot 'sub/d.txt') -Value 'only in target' -NoNewline

        $result = Compare-DirectoryTrees -SourcePath $script:sourceRoot -TargetPath $script:targetRoot
        $result.SourceOnly | Should -Contain 'sub/c.txt'
        $result.TargetOnly | Should -Contain 'sub/d.txt'
        $result.Modified | Should -Contain 'a.txt'
        $result.Identical | Should -Contain 'sub/b.txt'
    }
}

<#
.SYNOPSIS
    Directory Tree Sync — compares two directory trees by SHA-256 content hash,
    identifies differences, and generates/executes a sync plan.

.DESCRIPTION
    Provides functions to:
    - Hash all files in a directory tree (Get-FileHashMap)
    - Compare two directory trees (Compare-DirectoryTrees)
    - Generate a sync plan (New-SyncPlan)
    - Execute a sync plan in dry-run or execute mode (Invoke-SyncPlan)
#>

function Get-FileHashMap {
    <#
    .SYNOPSIS
        Builds a hashtable mapping relative file paths to their SHA-256 hashes.
    #>
    [CmdletBinding()]
    [OutputType([hashtable])]
    param(
        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
        [string]$Path
    )

    if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $Path -PathType Container)) {
        throw "Directory not found: $Path"
    }

    [hashtable]$hashMap = @{}
    [string]$resolvedRoot = (Resolve-Path -LiteralPath $Path).Path

    # Get all files recursively
    [System.IO.FileInfo[]]$files = @(Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $resolvedRoot -File -Recurse)

    foreach ($file in $files) {
        # Compute relative path and normalize to forward slashes
        [string]$relativePath = $file.FullName.Substring($resolvedRoot.Length).TrimStart([System.IO.Path]::DirectorySeparatorChar, '/')
        [string]$normalizedPath = $relativePath.Replace([System.IO.Path]::DirectorySeparatorChar, '/')

        # Compute SHA-256 hash
        [string]$hash = (Get-FileHash -LiteralPath $file.FullName -Algorithm SHA256).Hash
        $hashMap[$normalizedPath] = $hash
    }

    return $hashMap
}

    [OutputType([hashtable])]
    param(
        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
        [string]$SourcePath,

        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
        [string]$TargetPath
    )

    [hashtable]$sourceMap = Get-FileHashMap -Path $SourcePath
    [hashtable]$targetMap = Get-FileHashMap -Path $TargetPath

    # Collect all unique relative paths from both trees
    [System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]]$allKeys = [System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]]::new()
    foreach ($key in $sourceMap.Keys) { [void]$allKeys.Add([string]$key) }
    foreach ($key in $targetMap.Keys) { [void]$allKeys.Add([string]$key) }

    [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]$sourceOnly = [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]::new()
    [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]$targetOnly = [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]::new()
    [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]$modified   = [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]::new()
    [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]$identical   = [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]::new()

    foreach ($key in $allKeys) {
        [bool]$inSource = $sourceMap.ContainsKey($key)
        [bool]$inTarget = $targetMap.ContainsKey($key)

        if ($inSource -and -not $inTarget) {
            $sourceOnly.Add($key)
        }
        elseif (-not $inSource -and $inTarget) {
            $targetOnly.Add($key)
        }
        elseif ([string]$sourceMap[$key] -eq [string]$targetMap[$key]) {
            $identical.Add($key)
        }
        else {
            $modified.Add($key)
        }
    }

    return @{
        SourceOnly = [string[]]@($sourceOnly)
        TargetOnly = [string[]]@($targetOnly)
        Modified   = [string[]]@($modified)
        Identical  = [string[]]@($identical)
    }
}

+        - Delete:    file exists only in target → delete from target

1	Set-StrictMode -Version Latest
2	$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
3	
4	<#
5	.SYNOPSIS
6	    Directory Tree Sync — compares two directory trees by SHA-256 content hash,
7	    identifies differences, and generates/executes a sync plan.
8	
9	.DESCRIPTION
10	    Provides functions to:
11	    - Hash all files in a directory tree (Get-FileHashMap)
12	    - Compare two directory trees (Compare-DirectoryTrees)
13	    - Generate a sync plan (New-SyncPlan)
14	    - Execute a sync plan in dry-run or execute mode (Invoke-SyncPlan)
15	#>
16	
17	function Get-FileHashMap {
18	    <#
19	    .SYNOPSIS
20	        Builds a hashtable mapping relative file paths to their SHA-256 hashes.
21	    #>
22	    [CmdletBinding()]
23	    [OutputType([hashtable])]
24	    param(
25	        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
26	        [string]$Path
27	    )
28	
29	    if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $Path -PathType Container)) {
30	        throw "Directory not found: $Path"
31	    }
32	
33	    [hashtable]$hashMap = @{}
34	    [string]$resolvedRoot = (Resolve-Path -LiteralPath $Path).Path
35	
36	    # Get all files recursively
37	    [System.IO.FileInfo[]]$files = @(Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $resolvedRoot -File -Recurse)
38	
39	    foreach ($file in $files) {
40	        # Compute relative path and normalize to forward slashes
41	        [string]$relativePath = $file.FullName.Substring($resolvedRoot.Length).TrimStart([System.IO.Path]::DirectorySeparatorChar, '/')
42	        [string]$normalizedPath = $relativePath.Replace([System.IO.Path]::DirectorySeparatorChar, '/')
43	
44	        # Compute SHA-256 hash
45	        [string]$hash = (Get-FileHash -LiteralPath $file.FullName -Algorithm SHA256).Hash
46	        $hashMap[$normalizedPath] = $hash
47	    }
48	
49	    return $hashMap
50	}
51	
52	function Compare-DirectoryTrees {
53	    <#
54	    .SYNOPSIS
55	        Compares two directory trees by SHA-256 hash and categorizes files.
56	    .OUTPUTS
57	        A hashtable with keys: SourceOnly, TargetOnly, Modified, Identical
58	        Each value is a string array of relative file paths.
59	    #>
60	    [CmdletBinding()]
61	    [OutputType([hashtable])]
62	    param(
63	        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
64	        [string]$SourcePath,
65	
66	        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
67	        [string]$TargetPath
68	    )
69	
70	    [hashtable]$sourceMap = Get-FileHashMap -Path $SourcePath
71	    [hashtable]$targetMap = Get-FileHashMap -Path $TargetPath
72	
73	    # Collect all unique relative paths from both trees
74	    [System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]]$allKeys = [System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]]::new()
75	    foreach ($key in $sourceMap.Keys) { [void]$allKeys.Add([string]$key) }
76	    foreach ($key in $targetMap.Keys) { [void]$allKeys.Add([string]$key) }
77	
78	    [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]$sourceOnly = [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]::new()
79	    [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]$targetOnly = [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]::new()
80	    [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]$modified   = [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]::new()
81	    [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]$identical   = [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]::new()
82	
83	    foreach ($key in $allKeys) {
84	        [bool]$inSource = $sourceMap.ContainsKey($key)
85	        [bool]$inTarget = $targetMap.ContainsKey($key)
86	
87	        if ($inSource -and -not $inTarget) {
88	            $sourceOnly.Add($key)
89	        }
90	        elseif (-not $inSource -and $inTarget) {
91	            $targetOnly.Add($key)
92	        }
93	        elseif ([string]$sourceMap[$key] -eq [string]$targetMap[$key]) {
94	            $identical.Add($key)
95	        }
96	        else {
97	            $modified.Add($key)
98	        }
99	    }
100	
101	    return @{
102	        SourceOnly = [string[]]@($sourceOnly)
103	        TargetOnly = [string[]]@($targetOnly)
104	        Modified   = [string[]]@($modified)
105	        Identical  = [string[]]@($identical)
106	    }
107	}
108	
109	function New-SyncPlan {
110	    <#
111	    .SYNOPSIS
112	        Generates a sync plan to make TargetPath match SourcePath.
113	    .DESCRIPTION
114	        Compares two directory trees and produces a list of actions:
115	        - Copy:      file exists only in source → copy to target
116	        - Overwrite:  file differs between source and target → overwrite in target
117	        - Delete:    file exists only in target → delete from target
118	    #>
119	    [CmdletBinding()]
120	    [OutputType([hashtable])]
121	    param(
122	        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
123	        [string]$SourcePath,
124	
125	        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
126	        [string]$TargetPath
127	    )
128	
129	    [hashtable]$comparison = Compare-DirectoryTrees -SourcePath $SourcePath -TargetPath $TargetPath
130	
131	    [System.Collections.Generic.List[hashtable]]$actions = [System.Collections.Generic.List[hashtable]]::new()
132	
133	    # Files only in source need to be copied to target
134	    foreach ($file in $comparison.SourceOnly) {
135	        $actions.Add(@{
136	            Action       = [string]'Copy'
137	            RelativePath = [string]$file
138	        })
139	    }
140	
141	    # Files that differ need to be overwritten in target from source
142	    foreach ($file in $comparison.Modified) {
143	        $actions.Add(@{
144	            Action       = [string]'Overwrite'
145	            RelativePath = [string]$file
146	        })
147	    }
148	
149	    # Files only in target need to be deleted
150	    foreach ($file in $comparison.TargetOnly) {
151	        $actions.Add(@{
152	            Action       = [string]'Delete'
153	            RelativePath = [string]$file
154	        })
155	    }
156	
157	    return @{
158	        SourcePath = [string]$SourcePath
159	        TargetPath = [string]$TargetPath
160	        Actions    = [hashtable[]]@($actions)
161	    }
162	}
163	
164	function Invoke-SyncPlan {
165	    <#
166	    .SYNOPSIS
167	        Executes a sync plan in either dry-run (report only) or execute mode.
168	    .DESCRIPTION
169	        In DryRun mode: reports what would happen without changing any files.
170	        In Execute mode: performs Copy, Overwrite, and Delete operations to
171	        make the target directory match the source.
172	    #>
173	    [CmdletBinding()]
174	    [OutputType([hashtable])]
175	    param(
176	        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
177	        [hashtable]$Plan,
178	
179	        [Parameter()]
180	        [switch]$DryRun
181	    )
182	
183	    [string]$sourcePath = [string]$Plan.SourcePath
184	    [string]$targetPath = [string]$Plan.TargetPath
185	    [System.Collections.Generic.List[hashtable]]$performed = [System.Collections.Generic.List[hashtable]]::new()
186	
187	    foreach ($action in $Plan.Actions) {
188	        [string]$actionType = [string]$action.Action
189	        [string]$relativePath = [string]$action.RelativePath
190	        [string]$sourceFile = Join-Path $sourcePath $relativePath
191	        [string]$targetFile = Join-Path $targetPath $relativePath
192	
193	        if ($DryRun) {
194	            $performed.Add(@{
195	                Action       = $actionType
196	                RelativePath = $relativePath
197	                Status       = [string]'DryRun'
198	            })
199	            continue
200	        }
201	
202	        try {
203	            switch ($actionType) {
204	                'Copy' {
205	                    # Ensure parent directory exists
206	                    [string]$parentDir = Split-Path -Path $targetFile -Parent
207	                    if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $parentDir)) {
208	                        New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $parentDir -Force | Out-Null
209	                    }
210	                    Copy-Item -LiteralPath $sourceFile -Destination $targetFile -Force
211	                }
212	                'Overwrite' {
213	                    Copy-Item -LiteralPath $sourceFile -Destination $targetFile -Force
214	                }
215	                'Delete' {
216	                    Remove-Item -LiteralPath $targetFile -Force
217	                }
218	                default {
219	                    throw "Unknown action type: $actionType"
220	                }
221	            }
222	
223	            $performed.Add(@{
224	                Action       = $actionType
225	                RelativePath = $relativePath
226	                Status       = [string]'Executed'
227	            })
228	        }
229	        catch {
230	            $performed.Add(@{
231	                Action       = $actionType
232	                RelativePath = $relativePath
233	                Status       = [string]'Failed'
234	                Error        = [string]$_.Exception.Message
235	            })
236	            Write-Error "Failed to $actionType '$relativePath': $($_.Exception.Message)"
237	        }
238	    }
239	
240	    return @{
241	        DryRun           = [bool]$DryRun
242	        ActionsPerformed = [hashtable[]]@($performed)
243	    }
244	}

  - `Error handling` (3 tests): nonexistent directories throw meaningful errors
  - `Edge cases` (4 tests): empty files, binary content, filenames with spaces, empty-to-empty sync
